hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
ot: otype
p: ot,, s0 = s
q: pr1 TerminalHSET
transportf
  (λ x : otype, (∑ _ : x,, s0 = s, unit) ⨿ ξ (x,, s0))
  ((let p := maponpaths pr1 p in ! p)
   :
   pr1
     ((Down_works_with_ext_to ξ s s0
       · Down_works_with_ext_from ξ s s0)
        (ot,, inl (p,, q))) =
   pr1
     (identity
        (CoproductsHSET otype (pr2 otype)
           (λ a : otype,
            BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
              (make_precategory_one_assoc
                 ((sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a0 b c : sort, pathscomp0))
                 (make_dirprod
                    (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
                     idpath f)
                    (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
                     pathscomp0rid f),,
                  (λ (a0 b c d : sort) (f : a0 = b)
                   (g : b = c), path_assoc f g)),,
               (λ (a0 b : sort) (x x' : a0 = b)
                (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                Hsort a0 b x x' x0 x'0)) SET
              BinCoproductsHSET
              (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s) ξ
              (a,, s0))) (ot,, inl (p,, q))))
  (pr2
     ((Down_works_with_ext_to ξ s s0
       · Down_works_with_ext_from ξ s s0)
        (ot,, inl (p,, q)))) =
pr2
  (identity
     (CoproductsHSET otype (pr2 otype)
        (λ a : otype,
         BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
           (make_precategory_one_assoc
              ((sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a0 b c : sort, pathscomp0))
              (make_dirprod
                 (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
                  idpath f)
                 (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
                  pathscomp0rid f),,
               (λ (a0 b c d : sort) (f : a0 = b)
                (g : b = c), path_assoc f g)),,
            (λ (a0 b : sort) (x x' : a0 = b)
             (x0 x'0 : x = x'), Hsort a0 b x x' x0 x'0))
           SET BinCoproductsHSET
           (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s) ξ
           (a,, s0))) (ot,, inl (p,, q)))
 
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s0: UntypedForests.sort
ot: otype
q: pr1 TerminalHSET
transportf
  (λ x : otype,
   (∑ _ : x,, s0 = ot,, s0, unit) ⨿ ξ (x,, s0))
  (let p := maponpaths pr1 (idpath (ot,, s0)) in ! p)
  (pr2
     ((Down_works_with_ext_to ξ (ot,, s0) s0
       · Down_works_with_ext_from ξ (ot,, s0) s0)
        (ot,, inl (idpath (ot,, s0),, q)))) =
pr2
  (identity
     (CoproductsHSET otype (pr2 otype)
        (λ a : otype,
         BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
           (make_precategory_one_assoc
              ((sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a0 b c : sort, pathscomp0))
              (make_dirprod
                 (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
                  idpath f)
                 (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
                  pathscomp0rid f),,
               (λ (a0 b c d : sort) (f : a0 = b)
                (g : b = c), path_assoc f g)),,
            (λ (a0 b : sort) (x x' : a0 = b)
             (x0 x'0 : x = x'), Hsort a0 b x x' x0 x'0))
           SET BinCoproductsHSET
           (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET (ot,, s0)) ξ
           (a,, s0)))
     (ot,, inl (idpath (ot,, s0),, q)))

        apply idpath.

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest

  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]

  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
ot: otype
f2: Id ξ (ot,, s0)
(Down_works_with_ext_to ξ s s0
 · Down_works_with_ext_from ξ s s0) (ot,, inr f2) =
identity
  (CoproductsHSET otype (pr2 otype)
     (λ a : otype,
      BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
        (make_precategory_one_assoc
           ((sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
              (λ a0 b c : sort, pathscomp0))
           (make_dirprod
              (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b), idpath f)
              (λ (a0 b : sort) (f : a0 = b),
               pathscomp0rid f),,
            (λ (a0 b c d : sort) (f : a0 = b)
             (g : b = c), path_assoc f g)),,
         (λ (a0 b : sort) (x x' : a0 = b)
          (x0 x'0 : x = x'), Hsort a0 b x x' x0 x'0))
        SET BinCoproductsHSET
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s) ξ (a,, s0)))
  (ot,, inr f2)

 · Down_works_with_ext_to ξ s s0) x =

atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
p: constant_functor
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  (option_fun_summand UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     CoproductsHSET (pr2 s)) 
  (Down_Context ξ) s0
inl
  (Down_works_option_fun_summand_to s s0
     (pr1 s,,
      internal_paths_rew sort (pr1 s,, s0)
        (λ s : sort, pr1 s,, s0 = s)
        (idpath (pr1 s,, s0)) s
        (pr1
           (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort
              s0 (pr2 s)
              (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
               ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
              (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))),,
      pr2
        (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort s0
           (pr2 s)
           (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
            ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
           (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p)))) = inl p

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]

  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
q: Id (Down_Context ξ) s0
inr (pr1 q,, pr2 q) = inr q

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
p: constant_functor
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  (option_fun_summand UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     CoproductsHSET (pr2 s)) 
  (Down_Context ξ) s0
inl
  (Down_works_option_fun_summand_to s s0
     (pr1 s,,
      internal_paths_rew sort (pr1 s,, s0)
        (λ s : sort, pr1 s,, s0 = s)
        (idpath (pr1 s,, s0)) s
        (pr1
           (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort
              s0 (pr2 s)
              (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
               ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
              (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))),,
      pr2
        (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort s0
           (pr2 s)
           (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
            ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
           (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p)))) = inl p

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
p: constant_functor
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  (option_fun_summand UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     CoproductsHSET (pr2 s)) 
  (Down_Context ξ) s0
Down_works_option_fun_summand_to s s0
  (pr1 s,,
   internal_paths_rew sort (pr1 s,, s0)
     (λ s : sort, pr1 s,, s0 = s)
     (idpath (pr1 s,, s0)) s
     (pr1
        (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort s0
           (pr2 s)
           (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
            ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
           (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))),,
   pr2
     (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort s0
        (pr2 s)
        (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
         ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
        (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))) = p

atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
p: constant_functor
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  (option_fun_summand UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     CoproductsHSET (pr2 s)) 
  (Down_Context ξ) s0
transportf (λ _ : s0 = pr2 s, unit) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (Down_works_option_fun_summand_to s s0
        (pr1 s,,
         internal_paths_rew sort 
           (pr1 s,, s0) 
           (λ s : sort, pr1 s,, s0 = s)
           (idpath (pr1 s,, s0)) s
           (pr1
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 UntypedForests.sort s0 
                 (pr2 s)
                 (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
                  ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
                 (idpath s,, pr2 p) 
                 (pr1 p))),,
         pr2
           (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort
              s0 (pr2 s)
              (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
               ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
              (idpath s,, pr2 p) 
              (pr1 p))))) = 
pr2 p

            ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
           (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p)))) = pr1 p
 apply UntypedForests.Hsort'.
      
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
p: constant_functor
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
  (option_fun_summand UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     CoproductsHSET (pr2 s)) 
  (Down_Context ξ) s0
transportf (λ _ : s0 = pr2 s, unit)
  (let X :=
     λ (x x' : UntypedForests.sort) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
     pr1 (UntypedForests.Hsort' x x' x0 x'0) in
   X s0 (pr2 s)
     (pr1
        (Down_works_option_fun_summand_to s s0
           (pr1 s,,
            internal_paths_rew sort (pr1 s,, s0)
              (λ s : sort, pr1 s,, s0 = s)
              (idpath (pr1 s,, s0)) s
              (pr1
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    UntypedForests.sort s0 (pr2 s)
                    (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
                     ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
                    (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))),,
            pr2
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 UntypedForests.sort s0 (pr2 s)
                 (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
                  ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
                 (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p)))))
     (pr1 p))
  (pr2
     (Down_works_option_fun_summand_to s s0
        (pr1 s,,
         internal_paths_rew sort (pr1 s,, s0)
           (λ s : sort, pr1 s,, s0 = s)
           (idpath (pr1 s,, s0)) s
           (pr1
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 UntypedForests.sort s0 (pr2 s)
                 (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
                  ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
                 (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))),,
         pr2
           (internal_paths_rew_r UntypedForests.sort
              s0 (pr2 s)
              (λ s0 : UntypedForests.sort,
               ∑ _ : pr1 s,, s0 = s, unit)
              (idpath s,, pr2 p) (pr1 p))))) = pr2 p
 apply isProofIrrelevantUnit.
    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
s0: UntypedForests.sort
q: Id (Down_Context ξ) s0
inr (pr1 q,, pr2 q) = inr q
 apply idpath.
Qed.

→ [path_pregroupoid

ξ: sortToSet
s: sort
UntypedForests.ctx_equiv (Down_Context (ctx_ext ξ s))
  (UntypedForests.ctx_ext (Down_Context ξ) (pr2 s))

s: sort
aux:= # (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
  (Down_Context_on_mor η): [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
   UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]
⟦ pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
    (Down_Context ξ),
pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
  (Down_Context ξ') ⟧
pr1
  (pr1
     (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
        (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))
→ pr1
    (pr1
       (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
          (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s))

    exact (pr1 aux (pr2 s)).
Defined.

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest

elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ x
# Carrier_detype_data_ind (identity ξ) x elem =
identity (Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ x
pr2 Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ ξ (identity ξ) x elem =
identity (Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ x
pr2
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
              (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ ξ
  (identity ξ) x elem =
identity
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
              (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s))) ξ) x
  elem

pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1

            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]

  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    make_nat_trans
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
      (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))) ξ
  ξ (identity ξ) x elem =
identity
  (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     make_nat_trans
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
       (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))) ξ)
  x elem

  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)

    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ ξ
  (identity ξ) x elem =

  (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,

          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,

        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ) x
  elem

x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort

pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),

         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,

            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ ξ
     (identity ξ)) x elem =
pr1
  (identity
     (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
        functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
       (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)

atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest

  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat

→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]

ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
     (Down_Context_on_mor (identity ξ))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (identity
     (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
        functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
       (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
        (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
        is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ))
  x elem

σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
# Carrier_detype_data_ind (f · g) x =
(# Carrier_detype_data_ind f
 · # Carrier_detype_data_ind g) x

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)

     UntypedForests.sort

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧

elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr2 Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 ξ3 (f · g) x elem =
(pr2 Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2 Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr2
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
              (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1
  ξ3 (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   (make_functor_data
      (λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1
   ξ2 f
 · pr2
     (make_functor_data
        (λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                 (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
                 (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s))))
     ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1 ξ3
  (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1 ξ2
   f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ2
     ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    make_nat_trans
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
      (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))) ξ1
  ξ3 (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     make_nat_trans
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
       (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))))
   ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       make_nat_trans
         (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                  (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
         (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                  (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
         (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
            (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1
                     UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
                  (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))))
     ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1 ξ3
  (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
           (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
     is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1 ξ2
   f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ2
     ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1
     ξ3 (f · g)) x elem =
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1
     ξ2 f
   · pr2
       ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
                 (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
         is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
           (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
                 (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))
       ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
     (Down_Context_on_mor (f · g))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest

option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]

  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
     (# Down_Context_functor (f · g))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)

  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
     (# Down_Context_functor f
      · # Down_Context_functor g)) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_ind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
     (# Down_Context_functor f)
   · # UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind
       (# Down_Context_functor g)) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_ind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition Carrier_detype_ind : sortToSet2 :=
  Carrier_detype_data_ind ,, Carrier_detype_data_ind_is_functor.

atotype: atom → otype

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'

option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,

→ [path_pregroupoid

  SET]
ξ: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
s: sort
SET ⟦ Forest_Functor_H Carrier_detype_ind ξ s,
pr1 Carrier_detype_ind ξ s ⟧

SET
⟦ pr1
    (pr1
       (ContinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctor.hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized
          sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
          BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
          (arity sort Forest_Sig op)
          Carrier_detype_ind) ξ) s,
pr1 (pr1 Carrier_detype_ind ξ) s ⟧

Abort.

(*

Those definitions need a full proof of Detype_ind_alg_data to be complete.

Definition Detype_ind_alg : FunctorAlg Forest_Functor_Id_H.
Proof.
  use tpair.
  - exact Carrier_detype_ind.
  - change (Forest_Functor_Id_H Carrier_detype_ind --> Carrier_detype_ind).
    exact (Detype_ind_alg_data ,, Detype_ind_alg_data_is_nat_trans).
Defined.



Definition Detype_ind : Forest_ind --> Carrier_detype_ind.
Proof.
  exact (pr1 (InitialArrow Forest_ind_IA Detype_ind_alg)).
Defined.

*)

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
abs: (otype × otype)%set
ops (⟦ 3 ⟧)%stn UntypedForests.UntypedForest_Sig
 exact (inl (inl tt)).

  (Down_Context_on_mor η): [path_pregroupoid UntypedForests.sort
   UntypedForests.Hsort, SET]

       (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
          (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s))

    exact (pr1 aux (pr2 s)).

· # Carrier_detype_data_coind g

atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr2
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
              (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ ξ
  (identity ξ) x elem =
identity
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
              (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s))) ξ) x
  elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ ξ
  (identity ξ) x elem =
identity
  (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ) x
  elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    make_nat_trans
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
      (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))) ξ
  ξ (identity ξ) x elem =
identity
  (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     make_nat_trans
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
       (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1
                   UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))) ξ)
  x elem
