atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
     (Down_Context_on_mor (identity ξ))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (identity
     (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
        functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
       (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
        (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
        is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1
                   UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ))
  x elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
     (# Down_Context_functor (identity ξ))) (pr2 x)
  elem =
pr1
  (identity
     (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
        functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
       (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
        (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
        is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1
                   UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ))
  x elem

x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
     (identity (Down_Context_functor ξ))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1

                   UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)

arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ: sortToSet
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ x
pr1
  (identity
     (UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
        (Down_Context_functor ξ))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (identity
     (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
        functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
       (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
        (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
        is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1
                   UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ))
  x elem

    apply idpath.

pr2 Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 ξ3 (f · g) x elem =
(pr2 Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2 Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr2
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
              (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1
  ξ3 (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   (make_functor_data
      (λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1
   ξ2 f
 · pr2
     (make_functor_data
        (λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                 (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1
                    UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                 (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s))))
     ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort

  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1 ξ3
  (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ1 ξ2
   f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),

         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 s)))) ξ2
     ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    make_nat_trans
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
      (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))) ξ1
  ξ3 (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     make_nat_trans
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
       (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1
                   UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))))
   ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       make_nat_trans
         (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                  (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s)))
         (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                  (Down_Context ξ')) (pr2 s)))
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))
         (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
            (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1
                     UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                  (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))))
     ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)

  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
            (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1 ξ3
  (f · g) x elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
             (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
           (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
     is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1 ξ2
   f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),

        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ2
     ξ3 g) x elem

    
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1
     ξ3 (f · g)) x elem =
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1
     ξ2 f
   · pr2
       ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                 (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
         is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
           (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1
                    UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                 (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))
       ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)

  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest

  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1
     ξ3 (f · g)) x elem =
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
               (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
             (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)))) ξ1
     ξ2 f
   · pr2
       ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
                 (Down_Context ξ)) (pr2 s))),,
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (η : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
               (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z)),,
         is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
           (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1
                    UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
                 (Down_Context_on_mor η)) (pr2 z))))
       ξ2 ξ3 g) x elem
 
atom, otype: hSet
atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
     (Down_Context_on_mor (f · g))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)

  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat

  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]

  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET

→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
     (# Down_Context_functor (f · g))) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,

→ [path_pregroupoid

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
     (# Down_Context_functor f
      · # Down_Context_functor g)) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1

            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

atotype: atom → otype
arr: otype → otype → otype
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θForest:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET Forest_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort Forest_Sig: SigmaMonoid θForest
cl: UntypedForests.sort → syntcat
option_fun_summand2:= option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: sort
→ [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  SET]
option_fun_summand2_u:= option_fun_summand
  UntypedForests.sort
  UntypedForests.Hsort SET
  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET: UntypedForests.sort
→ [path_pregroupoid
     UntypedForests.sort
     UntypedForests.Hsort,
  SET]
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Carrier_detype_data_coind ξ1 x
pr1
  (# UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
     (# Down_Context_functor f)
   · # UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind
       (# Down_Context_functor g)) (pr2 x) elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
          (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor f)) (pr2 z)))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
            (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 UntypedForests.UntypedForest_coind)
              (Down_Context_on_mor g)) (pr2 z)))) x
  elem

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition Carrier_detype_coind : sortToSet2
  := Carrier_detype_data_ind ,, Carrier_detype_data_ind_is_functor.

End Typing.

End Signature.
